# infinity6

> Predictive AI for business. We turn data into decisions that anticipate the market — to grow revenue, protect margins and accelerate growth.

infinity6 builds predictive intelligence engines for B2B companies in retail, industry, pharma and CPG. Core solutions include adaptive demand forecasting, dynamic pricing, recommendation systems, and propensity models — deployed in 4–12 weeks with measurable financial impact.

## Pages

- [Home (EN)](/en): Predictive Intelligence for Business — overview of the i6 movement and engines.
- [Home (PT)](/pt): Inteligência Preditiva para Empresas — visão geral do movimento i6.
- [Solutions (EN)](/en/solutions): Real-time recommendations, dynamic pricing, adaptive forecasting.
- [Solutions (PT)](/pt/solutions): Recomendação em tempo real, preço dinâmico, forecasting adaptativo.
- [Success Stories (EN)](/en/success-stories): How companies grew revenue and reduced stockouts with i6.
- [Success Stories (PT)](/pt/success-stories): Cases reais de aumento de receita e redução de ruptura.
- [Contact (EN)](/en/contact): Schedule a strategic conversation.
- [Contact (PT)](/pt/contact): Agende uma conversa estratégica.
